item.title: OCaml Weekly News, 05 May 2026
item.description:
1. Oc — a Cargo-like CLI for OCaml beginners (AI-assisted, feedback very welcome)
  2. Dune Package Management Updates
  3. OCaml Users Survey 2026
  4. OCaml Web tutorials
  5. Valkey 0.3.1: client-side caching, blocking pools, IAM auth and mTLS

item.title: OCaml Weekly News, 28 Apr 2026
item.description:
1. Closing Old Bugs With Tests: A Dune Contribution Story
  2. ocaml-wire: a Binary wire format DSL with EverParse 3D output
  3. valkey: modern Valkey client for OCaml 5 + Eio, on opam
  4. UnifiedScript_{Std,Top} - literate testing
  5. openrouter_api: An OpenRouter client library
  6. Call for presentations: Caml in the Capital II

item.title: OCaml Weekly News, 21 Apr 2026
item.description:
1. http-date v0.2 — Zero-dependency HTTP date parsing for OCaml
  2. Caqti 2.3.0
  3. layoutz 0.1.0 🪶 - Zero-dep Elm-style TUIs and terminal plots for your OCaml apps
  4. Dune 3.22
  5. ptt, a mailing list system as unikernel
  6. Mollymawk and Albatross orchestrating all virtual machines
  7. OUPS meetup april 2026
  8. Stk 0.6 released
  9. opam 2.5.1
  10. Restarting OCaml.jp: The OCaml Japan User Group
  11. Code navigation and search on Github
  12. Seeking maintainers for our OCaml SIP server, gRPC, and HTTP/2 libraries
  13. ppx_mixins: slightly more elegant mixin syntax
  14. Experience Report: Refining Dune’s Dependency Graph
  15. First beta release of OCaml 5.5.0
  16. ocgtk 0.1: OCaml bindings for GTK 4 (preview release)

item.title: OCaml Weekly News, 14 Apr 2026
item.description:
1. Call for presentations: Caml in the Capital II
  2. List your open OCaml positions on the OCaml.org job board
  3. YAMLx: pure-OCaml YAML 1.2/1.1 library
  4. ocaml-letsencrypt, an OCaml way to get TLS certificates
  5. New release of OCaml LSP 1.26.0 and Merlin 5.7.0-504
  6. OCaml YAML library
  7. I18n 5.0 — Internationalisation made easy for any OCaml app
  8. ATD 4.1.0 - now with YAML support

item.title: OCaml Weekly News, 07 Apr 2026
item.description:
1. restricted 2.0.0 limit which system operations and which parts of the filesystem your program can access
  2. Job offer: compiler engineer for Catala @ CNAF (social benefits agency)
  3. ocgtk 0.1: OCaml bindings for GTK 4 (preview release)
  4. out-channel-redirect 0.1 — Redirect and capture out_channel output
  5. ppxlib.0.38.0
  6. A Proposal for Voluntary AI Disclosure in OCaml Code
  7. Blog: OCaml documentation as markdown
  8. hotseat Squava (a tiny LablGtk2 demo)
  9. opentelemetry 0.90 (and associated libraries)
  10. Dune 3.22

item.title: OCaml Weekly News, 31 Mar 2026
item.description:
1. Improve signature-help feature in Merlin
  2. Feedback Wanted: Upcoming OCaml Users Survey 2026 Questions
  3. OCaml Users Survey 2023 Results
  4. ortac-0.8 specification-driven testing with Domains
  5. Third alpha release for OCaml 5.5.0
  6. ocaml-openapi-gen 0.1.0, ocaml-forgejo
  7. CS6868 Concurrent Programming -- Course Materials
  8. libinput - OCaml bindings for Linux input devices
  9. OCaml compiler office hours

item.title: OCaml Weekly News, 24 Mar 2026
item.description:
1. Introducing atdml (experimental)
  2. Experimental module imports in ATD (ATD 4.0.0)
  3. Dune 3.22
  4. Parseff: parser combinator library for OCaml 5
  5. Outreachy Demo Day for December 2025 Round

item.title: OCaml Weekly News, 17 Mar 2026
item.description:
1. Public securiy meeting
  2. Google OR-Tools: CP-SAT Subset
  3. Neocaml-mode (A modern Emacs major mode for OCaml) is looking for testers
  4. oui: multi-platform binary installers
  5. Nixtamal: Fulfilling Input Pinning for Nix
  6. OCaml-RDF 1.2.0
  7. Slipshow!
  8. Is there a public archive for the caml-list?

item.title: OCaml Weekly News, 10 Mar 2026
item.description:
1. Eliom 12: Client-server applications in Web Assembly
  2. melange-str: Str module for Melange
  3. Outreachy May 2026
  4. Research engineer or postdoc position at Inria Rennes: static analysis of OCaml programs
  5. RFC: multifile ATD definition support via import statements

item.title: OCaml Weekly News, 03 Mar 2026
item.description:
1. Lwt.6.1.0, Lwt_ppx.6.1.0
  2. OCaml Platform Newsletter: November 2025 to January 2026
  3. Announcing the first release of Alice, a radical OCaml build system
  4. mnet, a new TCP/IP stack for unikernels in OCaml
  5. Experiment: format-line
  6. Caml in the Capital - Registrations Open!
  7. Experimental tools for migrating from Lwt to Eio
  8. First alpha release of OCaml 5.5.0
  9. NotInriaCaml_Std.Wenv@0.1.0 - create Windows envs on macOS [dk0]
  10. Running Real Docker Containers in OCaml Tests
  11. I wrote a DSL for AI personalities in OCaml
  12. Outreachy May 2026
